name: ResNet-50
description: ResNet-50 (Microsoft Research (He et al.)): full graph; dimensions verified against the official config.json.

components.name: s1b1 1x1 64
components.notes: Bottleneck: 1x1 reduce, 3x3 conv, 1x1 expand. One of 16 blocks (3+4+6+3).

components.name: s1 downsample 1x1
components.notes: Projection shortcut at the stage boundary.

components.name: s2 downsample 1x1/2
components.notes: Projection shortcut at the stage boundary.

components.name: s3 downsample 1x1/2
components.notes: Projection shortcut at the stage boundary.

components.name: s4 downsample 1x1/2
components.notes: Projection shortcut at the stage boundary.
